ksa_text: Ability to develop and implement data and AI governance policies and procedures that operationalize organizational governance frameworks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Assist in the development and refinement of priority information requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology
Assist in the development and refinement of priority information requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-002 (DG, Ability) maps to Survey Researcher scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4714 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.471, onet=0.444, eu_ai_act=0.424. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4714 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-A-002 (DG, composite 0.4714) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4714 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4714 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4714, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
